description: The measured differential cross section in the $50 \le M_{ll} < 76$ GeV mass window, in bins of the $\varphi^*$ variable. The values are normalized by the bin width. This entry contains the covariance matrix of the results.
name: Covariance matrices for phistar mass 50-76
